title: eriosorus elongatus
intro: Eriosorus elongatus, also known as the slender woolly rosette, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Compositae, commonly found in the Andes mountains. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriosorus elongatus include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the roots to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
